additional_remarks.remark: ENDORSEMENT SCHEDULE: 1. IL 00 85 01 15 — Disclosure Pursuant to Terrorism Risk Insurance Act; 2. CG 20 26 04 13 — Additional Insured - Designated Person or Organization; 3. WC 00 03 13 — Waiver of Our Right to Recover from Others Endorsement; 4. CG 24 04 05 09 — Waiver of Transfer of Rights of Recovery Against Others to Us; 5. IM 99 01 08 08 — Inland Marine Equipment Floater; 6. CP 10 30 08 07 — Causes of Loss - Special Form.
Quantum Realty Management Inc. is included as additional insured per written contract, agreement, or permit as respects General Liability.
Primary and Non-Contributory wording applies per policy endorsement. Per Project Aggregate Limit applies as indicated on the application schedule.

LOC-001: Corporate Headquarters & Main Terminal — 1200 Nationwide Boulevard, Columbus, OH 43215 (Occupancy: Warehouse); LOC-002: Rickenbacker Air Hub — 2500 Norton Road, Columbus, OH 43217 (Occupancy: Warehouse); LOC-003: Cleveland Distribution Center — 6000 Rockside Woods Boulevard, Independence, OH 44131 (Occupancy: Warehouse); LOC-004: Pittsburgh Regional Terminal — 500 Technology Drive, Canonsburg, PA 15317 (Occupancy: Warehouse).

The insured's principal operations consist of: Regional moving and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors. Entity type Corporation.
